subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon, when the Lord of all beings came with the Most Great Sign and summoned the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الافق الاعلی اذ اتی مالک الوری بالایه الکبری و دعا اهل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
